title: Epic: Message methods (edit, delete, reactions, queryChanges)
description:
Why: Current codebase has Message/get, Message/query, Message/changes, and Message/set (create only). Missing: edit message body, soft/hard delete, add/remove emoji reactions, update readAt, text search filter, threadRootId filter, Message/queryChanges, and rateLimited slow-mode error.

What:
- Message/set update: edit body (author-only, within edit window)
- Message/set destroy: delete message
- Message/set reactions: add/remove emoji reactions (per reaction-set semantics)
- Message/set readAt: mark read timestamp
- Message/query: text filter, threadRootId filter
- Message/queryChanges
- rateLimited SetError handling with countdown timer
- Fixture tests for all new operations

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
close_reason: All 6 methods implemented, 35 tests passing, r4c review converged
